import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Save QAT Temp Data Source"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/pipeline/datasource/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to save data source for specified program into temp table

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"pipelineId","in":"path","description":"PipelineId for which you need data source to save for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"name":"ppu","description":"Array of data source which needs to be saved"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Array of data source which needs to be saved","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"dataSourceId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"dataSourceTypeId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"pipelineDataSourceType":{"type":"string"},"pipelineDataSource":{"type":"string"},"pipelineDataSourceId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QatTempDataSource"}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns a Success code if the operation was successful","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR if there was some other error that did not allow the operation to complete","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
